name: Better Proposals API
what_it_does: Web-based proposal creation and management platform with REST API — enabling sales and service teams to create professional, trackable proposals with real-time open notifications, eSignature collection, online payment acceptance, proposal analytics, and CRM integration for streamlined sales closing workflow.
use_cases: Creating proposals programmatically from templates via API for automated delivery
Querying proposal view and engagement analytics for sales team performance reporting
Triggering proposal creation when CRM opportunities reach proposal stage
Integrating signature completion events with CRM for automated deal closure tracking
Managing proposal templates programmatically for consistent branding across teams
not_for: Complex CPQ with product configuration (use DealHub or Apttus for CPQ)
RFP response automation (use Loopio or RFPIO)
Enterprise contract lifecycle management (use Ironclad or DocuSign CLM)
best_when: A freelancer, agency, or SMB sales team wants to create professional web-based proposals quickly with built-in tracking, eSignature, and payment collection, replacing PDF/Word proposals with interactive online proposals.
avoid_when: You need complex CPQ with pricing rules, enterprise contract management, or RFP automation — Better Proposals is for simpler proposal use cases.

auth.notes: API key from Better Proposals account settings. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. Webhook for proposal view, sign, and payment events. Zapier integration for no-code workflow automation. No OAuth2. HubSpot, Salesforce, and Stripe integrations via native connectors.

pricing.notes: UK-based company (Isle of Man). Founded 2015. Bootstrapped and profitable. Affordable pricing for freelancers and agencies — key differentiator. Built-in online payment via Stripe/PayPal. Proposal analytics show page-by-page view time. Live chat support from within proposal. 200+ professional templates. Popular with agencies, consultants, and SMB sales teams.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for proposals, templates, clients, and analytics. Bearer token auth. Good documentation. Proposal creation from templates is straightforward. Webhook for key events. Payment integration via Stripe/PayPal configured in admin. Zapier as primary integration path for many users.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Proposal reads idempotent. Template reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by date range. Proposal creation not idempotent — check for existing before creating.
known_agent_gotchas: Bootstrapped indie product — API support response time may vary
Templates must exist before API-driven proposal creation
Payment integration (Stripe/PayPal) configured in admin — not API-driven setup
GDPR: proposal view tracking is behavioral PII for EU clients
Proposal analytics require client to open and view web link

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. EU data residency. Bearer token auth. Proposal pricing data is sensitive — restrict API access. Client payment data handled by Stripe/PayPal — Better Proposals does not store card numbers. eSignature legally binding — maintain audit trail. Isle of Man jurisdiction with UK/EU data standards.
